# cloudflareext_secrets_store_secret (Ephemeral Resource)

Reads a Cloudflare Secrets Store secret metadata. Ephemeral resources are never stored in Terraform state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `secret_id` (String) The ID of the secret.
- `store_id` (String) The ID of the Secrets Store.

### Read-Only

- `comment` (String) A comment for the secret.
- `created` (String) The creation timestamp.
- `modified` (String) The last modification timestamp.
- `name` (String) The name of the secret.
- `status` (String) The status of the secret.
